channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Over 180 Wildfires Rage Through Northern Ontario, Dozens Out of Control
item.description: A record-breaking number of wildfires are currently burning across northern Ontario, with over 180 fires reported active as of July 16, 2026. Emergency management officials have confirmed that dozens ...

item.title: Taraba Police Arrest Student Over Illegal Firearm Possession
item.description: The Taraba State Police Command has arrested an 18-year-old student, Usman A. Usman, for illegally possessing a mini revolver pistol in Jalingo. The suspect, a student at the Sheikh Abdullahi Bala Lau...

item.title: NURTW factions agree to end leadership crisis after NLC mediation
item.description: The National Union of Road Transport Workers (NURTW) has made significant progress in resolving its prolonged leadership crisis after a peace meeting brokered by the Nigeria Labour Congress (NLC). The...

item.title: Chloe Slater Discusses Political Disillusionment and Social Media Desensitization in New Album
item.description: Chloe Slater, the Manchester-based artist, has shared her reflections on political disillusionment and the impact of social media in an interview with NME. Speaking ahead of the release of her debut a...

item.title: Gen Z's Vision for Tanzania's Future Development
item.description: The article explores how Generation Z in Tanzania perceives national progress, emphasizing their focus on contemporary living conditions and future opportunities rather than historical achievements. I...

item.title: DCP Candidate Leads in Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: Provisional results from the Ol Kalou constituency by-election show Democracy for the Citizens Party (DCP) candidate Sammy Douglas Kamau Waweru leading with 14,498 votes, representing 86.6% of the cou...

item.title: Veteran South African Actor Seputla Sebogodi Dies After Diabetes Complications
item.description: South Africa is grieving the loss of iconic actor and theatre pioneer Seputla Sebogodi, who passed away on 15 July 2026 following diabetes-related complications. The veteran performer, known for his g...

item.title: Robin Padilla's Views on Christian Communism and Muslim Muakhat Practices
item.description: Senator Robin Padilla clarified his belief in specific forms of communism during an impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. He distinguished between 'Christian communism' and the 'Mu’tah sys...

item.title: Delhi's Unemployment Rate Surpasses 12-Year High, Sparks Economic Concerns
item.description: Delhi's unemployment rate surged to 12% in March 2023, marking the highest level in 12 years, according to recent data. This alarming trend has raised concerns among economists and policymakers, highl...

item.title: Micah Richards Honors Father Who Was His Greatest Fan Before World Cup Match
item.description: Micah Richards, a former England defender and BBC sports pundit, paid heartfelt tribute to his late father Lincoln, who passed away shortly before the BBC broadcast of England's World Cup semi-final d...

item.title: University Graduate Honors Boda Boda Rider for Years of Support
item.description: A university graduate named Moh surprised her boda boda rider Adnan by placing her graduation sash on him after three years of consistent support. The touching video, shared online, shows Moh running ...

item.title: Trump's Stock Purchases and Subsequent Promotions Raise Conflict of Interest Concerns
item.description: A CNN investigation reveals President Donald Trump's pattern of buying stocks in over 20 companies and later promoting them on his social media platforms, raising significant conflict of interest conc...

item.title: Kenya's Cash Handouts Spark Concerns Over 2027 Election Integrity
item.description: Kenya’s political landscape is increasingly dominated by multimillion-shilling cash handouts as the country prepares for the 2027 general election. Senior politicians, particularly those aligned with ...

item.title: Security Breach at NBC's 'Today' Show as Intruder Attacks Host

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with access restrictions
item.description: The article discusses an error message generated by News Corp Australia's website, which blocks crawler bots. The message instructs users to disable AdBlockers, ensure JavaScript is enabled, and use t...

item.title: eThekwini's Crime-and-Grime Initiative Achieves 28% Crime Reduction in Durban CBD

item.title: Design trends and how to spot timeless home decor choices
item.description: The article explores the fleeting nature of interior design trends, using examples like battleship grey kitchens and white-on-white schemes that once dominated but now feel outdated. Experts like Sue ...

item.title: PCSO Lotto Results: No Winners in Major Jackpot Draws on July 16, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that there were no winners for either of the major lotto jackpot draws on July 16, 2026. The Superlotto 6/49 jackpot prize of P74,564,647.92 ...

item.title: Private Credit Growth Slows in Key Tanzanian Sectors
item.description: Private-sector credit growth in Tanzania decelerated in May as commercial banks adopted a more cautious lending approach, with financing momentum weakening across several critical economic sectors des...

item.title: NGOs Face Criticism for Hostile Behavior Toward Jews and Israel; Call to Label Anti-Israel Group as Terrorists
